name: Push-Up Variations Workout
description: A bodyweight push-up workout with 4 variations, progressing from commando push-ups to explosive and hand-reach variations, finishing with close-to-wide repositioning.

exercises.name: Commando Push-up
exercises.description: From push-up position, lower one arm to elbow, then the other, then push back up one arm at a time. Alternate which arm leads.
exercises.notes: 2 sets. Keep hips square, don't rotate.

exercises.name: Explosive Commando Push-up
exercises.description: From push-up position, drop both arms to elbows simultaneously, then explosively push back up to hands, leaving the ground.

exercises.name: Push-up Hand Reach
exercises.description: Lower into push-up. At the bottom, alternate reaching both hands out in front above your head, bring them back, then push up.
exercises.notes: 2 sets. Both hands tap forward before pushing up.

exercises.name: Close-to-Wide Push-up
exercises.description: Alternate between close-grip and wide-grip push-ups, lifting hands off the ground to reposition between each rep.

circuit.notes: 4 exercises, 2 sets each with varying reps (20, 15, 15, 15). Rest times not specified.

raw.caption: Pushp workout....
raw.visualSummary: A man in camo performs 4 push-up variations: alternating elbow drops, explosive double elbow drops, hand reaches at the bottom, and close-to-wide hand repositioning.

uncertainties: No rest times provided between exercises or sets.
